title: `Anaqiy #6062
definition:
Anakims = "long-necked"

 1) a tribe of giants, descendants of Anak, which dwelled in southern
    Canaan
nasbUsage:
Definition: Anakims = "long-necked"

 1) a tribe of giants, descendants of Anak, which dwelled in southern
    Canaan

    NASB:  neck, a giant people around Hebron and in Philistia
